title: Ubese environmental suit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Ubese_Enviormontal_suit.jpg|thumb|150px]]

The '''Ubese environmental suit''' was said to have been designed by the legendary and enigmatic [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]]. It offered little protection from hand-to-hand combat but was extremely effective against [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire and [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]].

{{Clothes-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
